name: parse-kv
prompt: Implement `pub fn parse_kv(s: &str) -> Option<(String, String)>` in src/lib.rs. It splits `s` on the FIRST '=' into (key, value) and returns Some((key, value)); if there is no '=', return None. A value may itself contain '='. The test in tests/parse.rs asserts this — make it pass without modifying the test.
context: A single-crate Rust library. Run `cargo test` to check your work.
